data.title: Binance founder CZ emphasizes 'real wealth' beyond money: health, loved ones, time, freedom, credibility, principles.
data.description: Binance founder, Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, shared his perspective on "real wealth" in a recent post, emphasizing that it transcends mere financial riches. According to CZ, true wealth encompasses elements such as health, relationships, time, freedom, credibility, principles, and positive influence. He highlighted the significance of being a content and morally upright individual, suggesting that it's never too late to prioritize these aspects over money. CZ's insights underscore a more holistic approach to wealth beyond monetary gain. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: ETHZilla, the Ether treasury, invests $12 million in plane engines as it intensifies its focus on tokenizing assets.
data.description: ETHZilla recently made a significant acquisition by purchasing two aircraft engines for a total of $12 million. This move comes shortly after the company announced a shift in strategy towards tokenizing tangible assets.

data.title: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited bags order for 6 chemical tankers of 18,000 DWT each from Europe's Rederiet Stenersen AS.
data.description: In Mumbai, India, on January 26, 2026, Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited (SDHI) made a significant announcement by securing their initial newbuild agreement. The contract involves the construction of six (6) IMO Type II chemical tankers, with a capacity of 18,000 Deadweight Tonnage (DWT) each. These tankers will be built at the company's revamped shipyard facilities.

data.title: Ninth "YouChenghui" Intl Youth Painting Exhibition launched in Malaysia, promoting creativity and friendship; ceremony held at Malaysia National Handicraft Arts Village.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia on January 26, 2026, the overseas debut of the ninth installment of the "You Chenghui" International Youth Painting Exhibition took place at the Malaysia National Handicraft Arts Village. The ceremony marked the beginning of this event, which was jointly arranged by various entities.

data.title: JCPenney in Texas offers the chance to exchange once-loved jewelry for a ½-carat lab-grown diamond necklace on Feb.14.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, JCPenney is holding an event on February 14th where customers can trade in a cherished item for a 0.5-carat lab-created diamond necklace.

data.title: SEMIFIVE and SAPIEN Semiconductors partner to develop 'CMOS Backplane' tech for micro-displays, focusing on AI wearables.
data.description: SEMIFIVE and SAPIEN have joined forces to fast-track commercialization by integrating SEMIFIVE's AI System-on-a-Chip platform with SAPIEN's specialized micro-LED display driver design skills. This partnership aims to enhance the micro-display value chain through a holistic collaboration spanning from design to verification. The focus is on tapping into the growing AI wearable market, with a particular emphasis on smart technologies. This collaboration is set to introduce innovative solutions and drive advancements in the field, capitalizing on the expertise and capabilities of both companies.

data.title: Buckingham announces Dustin Vrabel as new Managing Partner, effective Feb. 1, 2026, succeeding Steve Dimengo.
data.description: In Akron, Ohio, on January 26, 2026, Buckingham, Doolittle & Burroughs, LLC shared through PRNewswire that Dustin J. Vrabel will assume the role of Managing Partner and President starting February 1, 2026. He takes over from Steve Dimengo, under whose leadership the company experienced significant growth.
Japan’s Takaichi rules out combining BOJ ETF holdings, pension funds, and reserves to form a sovereign wealth fund.
Japan’s Takaichi: High risks exist in creating a SWF due to concerns over asset safety and liquidity requirements.

data.title: Europe's increasing dependence on U.S. natural gas raises concerns over Trump's leverage - tension over Greenland could give U.S. significant power.
data.description: Concerns have arisen due to tension surrounding Greenland, leading to fears that the Trump administration may use the U.S. oil and gas sector as leverage against Europe.
